_meta.source: INSEE France — DADS (Déclarations Annuelles de Données Sociales) 2022 + Eurostat SES 2022 France
_meta.methodology: France earnings data from Eurostat SES 2022, cross-referenced with INSEE DADS aggregate publications. Covers gross annual earnings by ISCO-08 occupation for enterprises 10+ employees. Paris (Île-de-France) figures derived from regional premium applied to national median — approximately 15–20% above national for tech and professional roles.
_meta.coverage: France national and Paris city-level (Île-de-France regional premium applied). Software developers, IT professionals, marketing/management roles.
_meta.limitations: ISCO-08 occupation codes are broad. Seniority inferred from earnings distribution percentiles. Paris premium is an estimate based on Île-de-France regional data, not a direct city-level figure from a single survey.
_meta.currency_note: All figures in EUR gross annual.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 2512 Software developers — France national, junior
records.notes: France junior software developers from Eurostat SES 2022. P25 earnings band. France has lower tech salaries than UK/NL/IE but above Spain.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 2512 Software developers — France national, mid
records.notes: France software developers from SES 2022. Paris is approximately 15-20% above national median for tech roles.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 2512 Software developers — France national, senior
records.notes: Senior software developers France. Upper quartile. Includes senior engineers at CAC40 and major tech companies.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022 + INSEE regional premium — Software developers, Paris (Île-de-France), mid
records.notes: Paris (Île-de-France) software developer mid-level. ~16% premium over national median based on regional earnings differential. Larger tech companies in Paris (Station F ecosystem, GAFAM subsidiaries) push above this level.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022 + INSEE regional premium — Software developers, Paris (Île-de-France), senior
records.notes: Paris senior software developers. Île-de-France regional premium ~15% over national. FAANG/large tech Paris presence inflates upper end.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 2512 — Product Manager proxy, France national
records.notes: ISCO 1221 digital/tech management — closest Eurostat mapping to product manager for France. Wide range across sectors.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022 — Marketing professionals, France national
records.notes: Marketing and advertising professionals France. ISCO 2431. Maps to marketing-manager, growth-manager, performance-marketing-manager.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022 — Data analyst / database professionals, France national
records.notes: Data analyst / database professionals France. ISCO 2529. Used for data-analyst and data-scientist role mapping.
